evidenceReviewed.source: OpenSpec artifacts: proposal, design, worker-dispatch spec, traceability, tasks, materialized Autopilot ledger, README routing/runtime guidance, and `openspec-autopilot` skill guidance.
evidenceReviewed.summary: OpenSpec artifacts: proposal, design, worker-dispatch spec, traceability, tasks, materialized Autopilot ledger, README routing/runtime guidance, and `openspec-autopilot` skill guidance.

evidenceReviewed.source: Source and tests recorded in `tasks.md`: runtime store, worker report parser, ledger transition writer, phase dispatcher, worker prompt builder, worker-session adapter, controller worker dispatch integration, plugin smoke, protected-path guard, programmatic triggers, instruction drift, and Autopilot check suites.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Source and tests recorded in `tasks.md`: runtime store, worker report parser, ledger transition writer, phase dispatcher, worker prompt builder, worker-session adapter, controller worker dispatch integration, plugin smoke, protected-path guard, programmatic triggers, instruction drift, and Autopilot check suites.

evidenceReviewed.source: Validation recorded in `tasks.md`: focused TypeScript tests, `npm run validate`, `npm test`, `npm run openspec:validate`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level standard --change enable-autopilot-worker-dispatch`, and `npm run autopilot:check -- --level prepush --change enable-autopilot-worker-dispatch` passed; `npm run validate` retained the known top-level `allow` warning in `opencode.json`.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Validation recorded in `tasks.md`: focused TypeScript tests, `npm run validate`, `npm test`, `npm run openspec:validate`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level standard --change enable-autopilot-worker-dispatch`, and `npm run autopilot:check -- --level prepush --change enable-autopilot-worker-dispatch` passed; `npm run validate` retained the known top-level `allow` warning in `opencode.json`.

evidenceReviewed.source: Reviewer gates: `code-quality-reviewer`, `test-coverage-reviewer`, `instruction-artifact-reviewer`, `deployment-config-reviewer`, and `openspec-consistency-review` all reached clean or non-blocking final rechecks after fixes.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Reviewer gates: `code-quality-reviewer`, `test-coverage-reviewer`, `instruction-artifact-reviewer`, `deployment-config-reviewer`, and `openspec-consistency-review` all reached clean or non-blocking final rechecks after fixes.

evidenceReviewed.source: Current Autopilot runtime evidence: explicit `/autopilot` selected `enable-autopilot-worker-dispatch` from `automation/task.json` and returned `reasonCode: ready_runtime_deferred`, so no worker was claimed and no protected ledger mutation occurred in this session.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Current Autopilot runtime evidence: explicit `/autopilot` selected `enable-autopilot-worker-dispatch` from `automation/task.json` and returned `reasonCode: ready_runtime_deferred`, so no worker was claimed and no protected ledger mutation occurred in this session.

evidenceReviewed.source: Boundary evidence: source-equivalent plugin worker-dispatch smoke passed, but no restarted live OpenCode enablement was attempted in this noninteractive session; MR, merge, deploy, push, and destructive cleanup remain out of scope.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Boundary evidence: source-equivalent plugin worker-dispatch smoke passed, but no restarted live OpenCode enablement was attempted in this noninteractive session; MR, merge, deploy, push, and destructive cleanup remain out of scope.

problems.problem: Worker-dispatch option diagnostics remain a reusable hardening item
problems.evidence: `tasks.md` deployment-config-reviewer evidence names strict plugin-option diagnostics follow-up plus live restarted E2E before target enablement
problems.impact: Operators enabling live dispatch could receive capability or deferred output without enough config/preflight detail
problems.rootCause: Deployment review identified live-enable diagnostics as intentionally deferred beyond the serial dispatch implementation slice
problems.recommendation: Tighten `workerDispatch` option diagnostics and live-enable preflight evidence before recommending target deployment

problems.problem: Early reviewer findings exposed report and scope safety gaps
problems.evidence: `tasks.md` records role-less report parsing, stale terminal worker scope, and validation-command guard blockers found before fixes
problems.impact: Worker output could have been misread or inactive/out-of-scope worker writes could have been trusted
problems.rootCause: Worker identity, assistant-message provenance, and shell command trust boundaries were under-specified before focused review
problems.recommendation: Keep assistant-only report extraction, inactive worker write blocking, validation-command allowlisting, shell-control fail-closed handling, and focused regressions as required safety coverage
problems.noFollowUpReason: Keep assistant-only report extraction, inactive worker write blocking, validation-command allowlisting, shell-control fail-closed handling, and focused regressions as required safety coverage

problems.problem: Protected Autopilot ledger remains plugin-owned despite manual completion evidence
problems.evidence: Current `/autopilot` returned `ready_runtime_deferred` for the materialized Ready ledger and this session did not mutate `openspec/changes/*/automation/**`
problems.impact: Future Autopilot inspection may still see the protected ledger until runtime dispatch or archive removes the active change from the queue
problems.rootCause: Autopilot protected state can only be advanced by plugin runtime, while the current session had no dispatch-capable runtime claim
problems.recommendation: Do not manually edit `automation/task.json`; use retro gate and archive workflow for completed change handoff, or enable live dispatch only with explicit safe runtime configuration
problems.noFollowUpReason: Do not manually edit `automation/task.json`; use retro gate and archive workflow for completed change handoff, or enable live dispatch only with explicit safe runtime configuration

problems.problem: Live restarted OpenCode worker-dispatch smoke was not run
problems.evidence: `tasks.md` records source-equivalent smoke passed and no restarted live enablement was attempted in this session
problems.impact: Source-equivalent tests prove adapter contracts but not a restarted server with local operator configuration
problems.rootCause: The noninteractive session cannot safely restart OpenCode and re-enter a target live-dispatch configuration
problems.recommendation: Keep live dispatch disabled by default and require target-environment restart plus worker-session capability evidence before enabling it operationally
problems.noFollowUpReason: Keep live dispatch disabled by default and require target-environment restart plus worker-session capability evidence before enabling it operationally

problems.problem: Single-runtime ownership remains an operational boundary
problems.evidence: README and skill document that `workerDispatch.enabled` assumes one OpenCode server/plugin runtime owns `.autopilot/runtime/state.json`
problems.impact: Concurrent server instances could race runtime state without an external lock or CAS layer
problems.rootCause: Durable runtime serialization is per plugin runtime instance and no cross-process lock or CAS layer is implemented
problems.recommendation: Preserve the documented single-runtime boundary until a separate locking/CAS change is accepted
problems.noFollowUpReason: Preserve the documented single-runtime boundary until a separate locking/CAS change is accepted

archiveGate.reason: Evidence reviewed, material implementation and reviewer findings were fixed in scope, validation passed, the remaining live-enable diagnostics item is routed to a follow-up change, and protected Autopilot ledger state was not manually mutated
